response:
May Progress Report, Part II: This progress report showcases the graphic improvements made during the rebuilding. Despite nearly doubling the framerate with optimization features added to the framework, the introduction of brand new hardware demanding features such as dynamic fluid particles and physics-based hair strands now pose new challenges to performance. We will strive to strike a balance between them.

Pic #1 demonstrates the new belly bulge system. In the rebuilt game, each character will have a specific stomach capacity which determines how much "body fluid" they can take in their womb, stomach, and bowel. For example, [Character Name A] can take 4000ml of fluid without overflowing, while [Character Name B] can only take 2800ml. Male test subjects eject a different load of fluid inside the character's body depending on their type: a [Subject Type A] ejaculates roughly 10-15ml per climax whilst a [Subject Type B] pumps 400-600ml into their mating partner.

Pic #2 and #3 show the new fluid graphics. The fluid VFX are not pre-tailored in the scenes; instead, they will trigger dynamically depending on the character's sensitivity, ecstasy, and stamina. Some character perks, acquired through experimenting with specific types of test subjects, raise the chance of urinary incontinence or massive squirting.

Pic #4 and #5 depict dynamic body interactions and skin decals in VR—the hands are moved through a VR controller. Pic #6, #7, and #8 are previews of the upcoming bondage devices and cooperative scenes. More details coming up next month. The May Monthly Poll and returning costume bundle shall drop in a few hours.
